offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delays in reimbursement approvals cause cash flow gaps. We automate the consolidation of requests instead of manual tracking and email approvals.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities about accounting workflows
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 reimbursement requests
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing requests
